requirements.title: Two recent pay stubs
requirements.description: Your two most recent pay stubs, no older than 60 days, so the office can see your current pay.

requirements.title: Benefit award letter
requirements.description: If you receive benefit payments, the letter that states your benefit amount, from the current benefit year.

requirements.title: Photo ID
requirements.description: A government photo ID for each adult, such as a driver's license or passport.

requirements.title: Proof of current address
requirements.description: A utility bill, lease, or bank statement showing your current address, no older than 90 days.

requirements.title: Household size
requirements.description: You confirm how many people will live in the home. This picks the right row in the income limit table.
